home.title: Hello, I'm
home.subtitle: Full Stack Web Developer
home.description: I am a full stack developer with experience in modern web application development, specializing in React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. My passion is focused on performance optimization and creating efficient and scalable solutions, with skills in teamwork and agile methodologies like Scrum.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full Stack Web Developer
about.profileDescription: I am a full stack web developer with experience in modern web application development. I specialize in technologies like React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, with a passion for performance optimization and creating efficient and scalable solutions. I have experience working in multidisciplinary teams using agile methodologies like Scrum.
about.frontendSkills: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES8+), Next.js, React, Redux Toolkit. Development of SEO-optimized interactive interfaces.
about.backendSkills: Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB. Creation of RESTful APIs and management of non-relational databases.
about.toolsSkills: Version control with Git and GitHub, Agile Methodologies (Scrum), ChatGPT, Gemini, GitHub Copilot, Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4, GPT-3.5 (OpenAI), LLaMA (Meta).
about.education2: University Institute of Administration and Management (UDAG)
